creator: bob@immure.com
text:
On Tue, Nov 30, 2010 at 03:20:18PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/tkmerge,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/152704 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152704

The patch looks fine to me.

> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Bob Willcox              OCEAN:  A body of water occupying about two-thirds
bob@immure.com                   of a world made for man -- who has no gills.
Austin, TX                              -- Unknown
